assigned_issues.title: How can I upload a docx file?

unassigned_issues.title: Feature: Support for access aws bedrock through role arn directly and retrieve the AKSK from boto3.Session directly

Support Prompt Caching with Vertex
How to handle Anthropic 'Overloaded' error when streaming in langchain
Batch API with Vertex
Cannot get partial json from streaming if we hit max_tokens as a step reason
Bedrock client failing to detect AWS region correctly can cause cross-region inference to fail
Bedrock needs inference profile ARN instead of model name
API 400 error: `Could not process PDF`
Malformed XML-like `TextBlock` response instead of `ToolUseBlock` with Batch API
Replace dependency on `jiter` with another JSON parser or add a fallback
Improve Vague 413 RequestTooLargeError Message
AnthropicBedrock retry policy not consistent with Bedrock Response
difference in caching behavior between `Anthropic` and `AnthropicBedrock`
content_block_delta event not deserialized correctly during streaming
Inconsistent failure to use thinking with Claude 4 Sonnet
Claude not available on Google's Vertex AI
Bedrock: support low-latency configuration
Tool calls do not contain required parameters which leads to infinite retry loop
* Question on implementation of orjson (json -> orjson)
Message Batch Processing - undocumented character limit for custom_id parameter
Feature request: add OAuth-based authentication
Feature Request: Support Custom Headers for MCP Server Calls
Caching does not work or not return  cache info when streaming is enabled
tools.0.web_search_20250305: Country code SG is not supported
Tool's JSON Output Does Not Adhere to Provided JSON Schema
Error 500/Internal server error when using tool with draft-07 JSON schema version since 2025-07-24, ~10AM GMT+2
Feature request: add a `CLAUDE.md` file to repo root
Cannot connect to MCP running in GCP
[Feature] Better thinking usage information
Tool inputs lost during streaming with Vertex AI integration (beta messages)
BetaMessageParam potentially missing BetaContentBlock?
Bug: Vertex AI incorrectly rejecting ~2MB requests with 413 '32MB limit exceeded' error
Feature request - enable 1M context window for claude_code_sdk
Select region on Anthropic infrastructure
Anthropic JSON Mode requires client to fabricate a nonsensical tool_use block
Unexpected citation format
Claude reads PDF using Visual Mode even if citations are disabled
AnthropicBedrock: AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK env var not supported
Prompt caching not working on Opus 4.5 and Haiku 4.5 (works correctly on Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.1)
Support class methods for tool helpers
Intermittent AttributeError in beta.messages.stream() with effort parameter: 'dict' object has no attribute 'to_dict'
/v1/messages - 413 Request too large - While under all limits.
aws bedrock can not support skill?
Token counting is not supported in Bedrock yet
Feature Request: Add tool_runner support for AnthropicBedrock client
Extra 'caller' Field in Request Breaks computer-use Between v0.74.1 and v0.75.0
Tool Search Tool (BM25) does not find tools with Japanese descriptions
Feature Request: Add `stream` helper to `AnthropicBedrock.beta.messages`
Tool runner exits early when response contains only server tool use blocks (e.g. web_search, web_fetch) and stop reason: pause_turn
[Opus 4.6] BetaCompactionBlock deserialized as ParsedBetaTextBlock during streaming accumulation
API rejects code_execution_20250825 tool: 'use_web_search_purpose: Extra inputs are not permitted'
🐛 Bug: Skills API returns immediate 500s when skills are enabled (base API works)
Structured outputs: "compiled grammar is too large" error needs better documentation and higher limits for complex schemas
Missing support from non-image EmbeddedResources
tool_use blocks returned with XML artifacts in name field
Structured outputs with Claude 4.6 on Vertex AI results in error
IndexError when streaming
Debug token
Prompt caching for Claude Sonnet appears to start at 2048 tokens instead of documented 1024
Python SDK: _transform_recursive blocking event loop on large message payloads
Feature request: Audio input support in Messages API
Use of `deepcopy_minimal` in `files.beta.upload` mutates dict in place
Structured output + thinking + tool use: two bugs in multi-turn conversations
Bedrock beta.messages missing .stream() method
Slow imports
Feature Request: Persistent context slot (flat monthly fee)
Bug Report: Claude Pro weekly usage limits depleting drastically faster since Claude 4.6 release
`web_search_20250209` dynamic filtering causes excessive `pause_turn` at ~110 content blocks — batch processing impractical
MCP connectors non-functional on claude.ai — mcp.etherscan.io hardblocked at network level
Streaming tool use: unhelpful error message when model emits malformed JSON (non-beta path missing try-except)
[RFC] Korean Tokenization: Jamo Decomposition as Pre-tokenizer (A Blueprint for Compositional Scripts)
API does not cleanly separate tool-use mechanics (search queries, results, narration) from the final authored content
docs: add example for mTLS / corporate proxy configuration
BetaAsyncAbstractMemoryTool docstring contains sync-only example (copy-paste from sync class)
500 Internal Server Error when input_examples contains an empty object {}
Gift subscription redeemed but account stuck on Free plan – no human support available
beta.skills.create intermittently fails with Cloudflare 520/502 (anthropic SDK python 0.86.0)
[Feature Request] Add Vietnamese language support for Claude Voice
Streaming tool_use with adaptive thinking: terminated stop_reason on long tool input content
[BUG] `client.beta.files.upload`  `PathLike` error
[SUPPORT] Financial damage report - Claude Code agent errors cost ~$45 USD
